description: A custom Agentic AI application built with React, Spring Boot, and IBM watsonx.ai. This replaces the standard Langflow implementation with a robust, enterprise-grade Java backend orchestration.

models_used.purpose: Core reasoning, skill gap analysis, dynamic question generation, and answer evaluation.

agents.name: Resume & JD Analyzer Agent
agents.role: Extracts skills from resumes and job descriptions and identifies missing skills.

agents.name: Technical Question Generator Agent
agents.role: Generates dynamic interview questions and hidden expected key points based on target skills.

agents.name: Answer Evaluator Agent
agents.role: Evaluates candidate responses against expected key points and returns a confidence score (0-100) and actionable feedback.
